title: Donald Trump's 2026 Acquisition of Greenland Push
about:
Donald Trump's 2026 Acquisition of Greenland Push refers to events in early 2026, following the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro , surrounding U.S. President Donald Trump 's desire to gain control of and take over the Danish Arctic island of Greenland, which he and his administration have deemed important for American strategic imperatives to combat Russian and Chinese expansion in the region. While President Trump expressed interest in purchasing the territory during his first term and the first year of his second term, his actions in early 2026 sparked far more publicity and online attention beginning in January 2026.

Throughout January 2026, negotiations between the Trump administration and Denmark became increasingly volatile and hostile, prompting defensive or retaliatory measures from Denmark and other NATO members who feared a possible invasion. Trump's hostility regarding a U.S. takeover of Greenland, despite European moderation, notably sparked controversy among many online, including his opponents, as well as some of his supporters. However, some still supported the push for various reasons, such as national defense.

The events surrounding President Trump's intentions to purchase or acquire Greenland garnered particular virality in early 2026, leading to international media coverage, internet discourse and other reactions. Memes and trends referencing Trump's desire for the U.S. to take over Greenland also spread widely online at the time.
